interface.longDescription:
Search for flights with flexible options around dates, nearby airports, baggage, and stops. 
Discover cheaper routes through virtual interlining (combining flights from different airlines that don't normally connect).
Explore destinations with "anywhere" searches or browse multiple options on an interactive map.
Get full itineraries with pricing, schedules, and booking links - all within the chat.
defaultPrompt: Flights from SF to some scuba-friendly destination south
